justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "Monday next week" as June 8th and "Tuesday" as June 9th, and successfully found and booked the user's preferred slot on Wednesday, June 10th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots on Wednesday, June 10th, when the user's initial request for Monday, June 8th, was unavailable, and then confirmed the booking when the user accepted one of those alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment, leading to a positive customer experience.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered from the initial unavailability by offering suitable alternatives and maintaining full context throughout the conversation.
